data.body:
I was assessed for French language classes today. Despite doing 843 days of Duolingo I was put into a Level 1 class. 

I tensed up when the instructor told me to ask any question I liked. 

“I missed your name! What is your name?” I gleefully asked. 

“En Francais, monsieur…”

“Uhhh.  Tu nom, SVP?”

Butchers and Bicycles Mk1e is the one I have.
